planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage as a guest (not logged in)
Verify the 'Özellikler' (Features) link is visible in the top navigation
Verify the 'Giriş Yap' button is visible in the header
Verify tournament navigation (Turnuvalar link and ⚔️ Turnuvalar button) is hidden for guests
Verify the 'Anasayfa' home link is visible in navigation
